unavailable_text: 2004-11-15	BODY ATTACHMENT ISSUED CIVIL WARRANT OF BODY ATTACHMENT (BENCH WARRANT) ORDERED FROM HEARING 10/20/04 @ 8:30AM THIS DATE WITH $1,500.00 CASH ONLY BAIL AND VOLUNTARY RETURN RESTRICTED TO ANY FRIDAY MORNING @ 9AM OR PRODUCTION BY SHERIFF'S DEPT. ON ANY WEEK DAY.
